message:
fix: add handoff message types to MessageType enum

Fixes TypeScript errors where handoff WebSocket event types were not
recognized by the MessageType union. Adds:
- handoff.initiated
- handoff.phase_changed
- handoff.accepted
- handoff.rejected
- handoff.escalated
- handoff.cancelled
- handoff.completed
- handoff.failed
- handoff.transfer_started
- handoff.transfer_completed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,6 +47,17 @@ export type MessageType =
   | "checkpoint.imported"
   // Agent mail
   | "mail.received"
+  // Handoffs
+  | "handoff.initiated"
+  | "handoff.phase_changed"
+  | "handoff.accepted"
+  | "handoff.rejected"
+  | "handoff.escalated"
+  | "handoff.cancelled"
+  | "handoff.completed"
+  | "handoff.failed"
+  | "handoff.transfer_started"
+  | "handoff.transfer_completed"
   // Fleet (RU)
   | "fleet.repo_added"
   | "fleet.repo_removed"
